description: Worktree creation in CreateWorktree hardcodes destination path. Add ability to specify destination directory while defaulting to current convention (.worktrees/branch-name relative to project root). Update TUI to allow optional path specification during worktree creation
note: Implemented optional destination parameter for worktree creation. Modified CreateWorktree in operations.go to accept empty string for default path or custom path (relative/absolute). Updated TUI to use two-step input: 1) branch name, 2) optional destination path. When path is empty, defaults to projectPath/.worktrees/branchName. Relative paths resolved relative to project root. Build successful, no errors.
acceptance_criteria: CreateWorktree should accept optional destination parameter
When destination not specified, default to projectPath/.worktrees/branchName
TUI input mode should allow optional path input (e.g., advanced mode or second prompt)
Path should be validated and normalized before passing to git worktree add
Relative paths should be resolved relative to project root
